title: Instant Message
description: Instant Message is a client-side Fabric mod for sending messages, running commands, and using GUI slot actions with custom keybinds.
body:
Instant Message is a client-side Fabric mod that lets you create quick-access chat messages, commands, and GUI slot actions using custom keybinds.

The mod is designed for players who often repeat the same chat messages or server commands. You can create entries in an in-game configuration GUI, assign a custom keybind to each one, and run them instantly while playing.

Instant Message can also help with command-based GUI workflows. You can bind an action to run a command and then automatically click a selected slot in the GUI that opens. This makes repeated server menu actions faster, easier, and more convenient.

Features:

- quick chat message entries
- quick command entries
- custom keybinds for each entry
- in-game configuration GUI
- automatic GUI slot actions
- left-click and right-click slot support
- useful for repeated server command workflows
- client-side usage

Example use cases:

- send a prepared chat message with one key
- run a server command instantly
- run a command and automatically select a GUI slot
- speed up repeated menu actions on servers

Requirements:

- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

Instant Message is lightweight and client-side. It does not add cheats or gameplay advantages; it only helps automate your own messages, commands, and GUI interactions.
